title: Young India Publication - Dashboard
description:
Built a portal to manage the lifecycle of research papers, providing dedicated dashboards for Admins, Authors, and Reviewers. Designed a multi-role workflow that allows authors to submit manuscripts, reviewers to leave feedback, and admins to oversee
the entire publication process in one place. Created a centralized file-sharing system that lets researchers upload documents and share them with the editorial team for
Review
technologies: Next.js, MongoDB, Mongoose, Redux Toolkit, Resend Mail, Cloudflare R2
